claims.summary: Burst-and-rest duration responds to fill and floors critical recovery rest at 30 seconds.
claims.disposition: Verified the current four-branch fill response, 30-second floor, and five-second rest-pulse loop in orchestration.rs.

claims.summary: Peripheral resonance can become stale because it is sampled only at a rest transition.
claims.disposition: Verified that creation, research, and starred-memory candidates are sampled once per rest transition and consumed once by eligible self-directed modes; source does not establish continuous freshness.

claims.summary: Resonance freshness and source diversity should be observed rather than assumed.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded read-only observation of candidate age, source class, selection, and consumption without storing private prose.

claims.summary: More frequent resonance polling would change autonomous behavior and timing.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Mike/operator live-behavior approval wait before changing polling, selection cadence, or self-directed mode inputs.
